name: Chocolate Sunshine Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat the butter until light and fluffy.
2. Gradually add sugar and continue beating until smooth.
3. Add eggs one at a time, mixing after each addition.
4. Stir in vanilla extract.
5. Sift together flour, cocoa powder, cornstarch, instant coffee, baking soda, and salt.
6. Alternately mix the dry ingredients and milk into the butter mixture, beginning and ending with the dry ingredients.
7. Grease two 9-inch round pans and lightly dust with cocoa powder.
8. Pour batter evenly into prepared pans.
9. Bake in a preheated oven for 20 minutes.
10. Cool in the pans on a wire rack for 10 minutes.
11. Remove cakes from pans and cool completely.
12. Once cooled, run a sharp knife around each cake to separate layers.
13. Spread orange cream filling over the bottom halves of the cakes.
14. Place the top halves back on and cover with plastic wrap until ready to serve.
Filling: Beat all ingredients together for the orange cream filling and refrigerate until needed.
